name: putnam_1975_a2
explanation:
have h_main : ∀ (b c : ℝ), (c < 1 ∧ c - b > -1 ∧ c + b > -1) ↔ (|c| < 1 ∧ 0 < 1 + b + c ∧ 0 < 1 - b + c) := by
  intro b c
  constructor
  · 
    rintro ⟨h₁, h₂, h₃⟩
    constructor
    · 
      have h₄ : -1 < c := by
        by_contra h

        have h₅ : c ≤ -1 := by linarith

        have h₆ : b > 0 := by
          by_contra h₆
          have h₇ : b ≤ 0 := by linarith
          have h₈ : c > b - 1 := by linarith
          have h₉ : c + b > -1 := by linarith
          nlinarith
        have h₇ : c > b - 1 := by linarith
        have h₈ : b < 0 := by
          by_contra h₈
          have h₉ : b ≥ 0 := by linarith
          have h₁₀ : c > b - 1 := by linarith
          have h₁₁ : c + b > -1 := by linarith
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h₅ : c < 1 := by linarith
      have h₆ : |c| < 1 := by
        rw [abs_lt]
        constructor <;> linarith
      exact h₆
    · constructor
      · 
        have h₄ : c > -1 - b := by linarith
        have h₅ : 0 < 1 + b + c := by linarith
        exact h₅
      · 
        have h₄ : c > b - 1 := by linarith
        have h₅ : 0 < 1 - b + c := by linarith
        exact h₅
  · 
    rintro ⟨h₁, h₂, h₃⟩
    constructor
    · 
      have h₄ : -1 < c := by
        cases' abs_cases c with h₅ h₅ <;> linarith
      linarith [abs_lt.mp h₁]
    · constructor
      · 
        have h₄ : c > b - 1 := by
          have h₅ : 0 < 1 - b + c := h₃
          linarith
        linarith
      · 
        have h₄ : c > -1 - b := by
          have h₅ : 0 < 1 + b + c := h₂
          linarith
        linarith


funext ⟨b, c⟩
have h₁ := h_main b c
simp_all [Prod.mk.injEq]
<;>
(try ring_nf at * <;> norm_num at * <;> simp_all [abs_lt]) <;>
(try constructor <;> intro h <;> simp_all [abs_lt]) <;>
(try ring_nf at * <;> norm_num at * <;> linarith) <;>
(try nlinarith)
<;>
(try
  {
    cases' le_or_lt 0 c with hc hc <;>
    simp_all [abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_neg, le_of_lt] <;>
    (try linarith) <;>
    (try nlinarith)
  })

name: putnam_1977_a3
actual_answer: fun f g x ↦ g x - f (x - 3) + f (x - 1) + f (x + 1) - f (x + 3)
proposed_answer: fun (f g : ℝ → ℝ) => fun x => g x - f (x + 3) - f (x - 3) + f (x + 1) + f (x - 1)
explanation:
have h_main : (fun f g x ↦ g x - f (x - 3) + f (x - 1) + f (x + 1) - f (x + 3)) = (fun (f g : ℝ → ℝ) => fun x => g x - f (x + 3) - f (x - 3) + f (x + 1) + f (x - 1)) := by
  funext f g
  funext x

  simp [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc]
  <;> ring_nf
  <;> norm_num
  <;> rfl
exact h_main

name: putnam_1985_b1
answer_error: Your answer is not simplified enough. Please give a more canonical simple Lean expression
explanation:
have h_main : ∀ (i : Fin 5), (i : ℤ) - 2 = List.get [-2, -1, 0, 1, 2] i := by
  intro i
  fin_cases i <;> simp [List.get, List.get]
  <;> rfl

have h_final : (fun i ↦ i - 2 : Fin 5 → ℤ) = (fun i => List.get [-2, -1, 0, 1, 2] i : Fin 5 → ℤ) := by
  funext i
  have h := h_main i
  simpa using h

exact h_final

name: putnam_1992_a4
actual_answer: fun k ↦ ite (Even k) ((-1) ^ (k / 2) * factorial k) 0
proposed_answer: fun k => if k % 2 = 0 then (-1)^(k / 2) * ↑(Nat.factorial k) else 0
explanation:
have h_main : (fun k ↦ ite (Even k) ((-1) ^ (k / 2) * factorial k) 0 : ℕ → ℝ) = (fun k => if k % 2 = 0 then (-1)^(k / 2) * ↑(Nat.factorial k) else 0 : ℕ → ℝ) := by
  funext k
  have h : Even k ↔ k % 2 = 0 := by
    rw [Nat.even_iff]
    <;> omega
  simp_all [h, Nat.cast_ofNat]
  <;>
  (try omega) <;>
  (try ring_nf) <;>
  (try norm_num) <;>
  (try aesop)
  <;>
  (try
    {
      split_ifs <;>
      (try omega) <;>
      (try simp_all [Nat.even_iff, Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.div_eq_of_lt]) <;>
      (try ring_nf at * <;> norm_num at * <;> aesop) <;>
      (try simp_all [Nat.even_iff, Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.div_eq_of_lt]) <;>
      (try ring_nf at * <;> norm_num at * <;> aesop)
    })
  <;>
  aesop
exact h_main

name: putnam_1998_a4
explanation:
have h_subset₁ : ({n | n ≡ 1 [MOD 6]} : Set ℕ) ⊆ ({n | ∃ k, n = 6 * k + 1} : Set ℕ) := by
  intro n hn
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Nat.ModEq] at hn ⊢
  have h : n % 6 = 1 := by omega

  have h₁ : ∃ k, n = 6 * k + 1 := by
    use n / 6
    have h₂ : n % 6 = 1 := h
    have h₃ : n = 6 * (n / 6) + (n % 6) := by omega
    rw [h₂] at h₃
    omega
  exact h₁

have h_subset₂ : ({n | ∃ k, n = 6 * k + 1} : Set ℕ) ⊆ ({n | n ≡ 1 [MOD 6]} : Set ℕ) := by
  intro n hn
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hn ⊢
  rcases hn with ⟨k, rfl⟩
  have h₁ : (6 * k + 1) % 6 = 1 % 6 := by
    simp [Nat.mul_mod, Nat.add_mod, Nat.mod_mod]
    <;> omega
  simp [Nat.ModEq, h₁]
  <;> omega

have h_main : ({n | n ≡ 1 [MOD 6]} : Set ℕ) = ({n | ∃ k, n = 6 * k + 1} : Set ℕ) := by
  apply Set.Subset.antisymm
  · 
    exact h_subset₁
  · 
    exact h_subset₂

exact h_main

name: putnam_2019_a1
explanation:
have h_subset₁ : ({n : ℤ | n ≥ 0 ∧ ¬Int.ModEq 9 n 3 ∧ ¬Int.ModEq 9 n 6} : Set ℤ) ⊆ ({ n : ℤ | n ≥ 0 ∧ ¬ (∃ a : ℤ, n = 9 * a + 3 ∨ n = 9 * a + 6) } : Set ℤ) := by
  intro n hn
  have h₁ : n ≥ 0 := hn.1
  have h₂ : ¬Int.ModEq 9 n 3 := hn.2.1
  have h₃ : ¬Int.ModEq 9 n 6 := hn.2.2
  have h₄ : ¬ (∃ a : ℤ, n = 9 * a + 3 ∨ n = 9 * a + 6) := by
    intro h
    rcases h with ⟨a, ha⟩
    cases ha with
    | inl ha =>

      have h₅ : Int.ModEq 9 n 3 := by
        rw [ha]
        <;> simp [Int.ModEq, Int.emod_eq_emod_iff_emod_sub_eq_zero]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> omega
      exact h₂ h₅
    | inr ha =>

      have h₅ : Int.ModEq 9 n 6 := by
        rw [ha]
        <;> simp [Int.ModEq, Int.emod_eq_emod_iff_emod_sub_eq_zero]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> omega
      exact h₃ h₅
  exact ⟨h₁, h₄⟩

have h_subset₂ : ({ n : ℤ | n ≥ 0 ∧ ¬ (∃ a : ℤ, n = 9 * a + 3 ∨ n = 9 * a + 6) } : Set ℤ) ⊆ ({n : ℤ | n ≥ 0 ∧ ¬Int.ModEq 9 n 3 ∧ ¬Int.ModEq 9 n 6} : Set ℤ) := by
  intro n hn
  have h₁ : n ≥ 0 := hn.1
  have h₂ : ¬ (∃ a : ℤ, n = 9 * a + 3 ∨ n = 9 * a + 6) := hn.2
  have h₃ : ¬Int.ModEq 9 n 3 := by
    intro h
    have h₄ : ∃ a : ℤ, n = 9 * a + 3 ∨ n = 9 * a + 6 := by
      have h₅ : Int.ModEq 9 n 3 := h
      rw [Int.ModEq] at h₅


      use (n - 3) / 9
      have h₆ : n % 9 = 3 := by omega
      have h₇ : n = 9 * ((n - 3) / 9) + 3 := by
        omega
      exact Or.inl (by omega)
    exact h₂ h₄
  have h₄ : ¬Int.ModEq 9 n 6 := by
    intro h
    have h₅ : ∃ a : ℤ, n = 9 * a + 3 ∨ n = 9 * a + 6 := by
      have h₆ : Int.ModEq 9 n 6 := h
      rw [Int.ModEq] at h₆


      use (n - 6) / 9
      have h₇ : n % 9 = 6 := by omega
      have h₈ : n = 9 * ((n - 6) / 9) + 6 := by
        omega
      exact Or.inr (by omega)
    exact h₂ h₅
  exact ⟨h₁, h₃, h₄⟩

have h_main : ({n : ℤ | n ≥ 0 ∧ ¬Int.ModEq 9 n 3 ∧ ¬Int.ModEq 9 n 6} : Set ℤ) = ({ n : ℤ | n ≥ 0 ∧ ¬ (∃ a : ℤ, n = 9 * a + 3 ∨ n = 9 * a + 6) } : Set ℤ) := by
  apply Set.Subset.antisymm
  · 
    exact h_subset₁
  · 
    exact h_subset₂

exact h_main
